## Description

<!-- Provide a brief summary of your changes. What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement

## DORA Metrics Compliance

<!-- PR Size Target: 70% of PRs should be under 200 lines -->

- **Lines Changed:** <!-- Aim for <200 lines, max 300 lines -->
- [ ] PR is under 200 lines (optimal)
- [ ] PR is 200-300 lines (acceptable)
- [ ] PR exceeds 300 lines - split required

## Testing

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and their results -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## AI-Generated Code Verification

<!-- If this PR contains AI-generated code, complete this section -->

- [ ] No AI-generated code in this PR
- [ ] AI code reviewed and verified
- [ ] Static analysis passed (ESLint)
- [ ] Type checking passed (tsc --noEmit)
- [ ] Unit test coverage ≥80%

## Security Checklist

<!-- Verify security requirements -->

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Parameterized queries used (no SQL injection risk)
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] No sensitive data logged

## Documentation

- [ ] Code is self-documenting with clear names
- [ ] JSDoc/comments added for complex logic
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues: Fixes #123, Relates to #456 -->

**Reviewer Notes:**

- Lead Time Target: <1 hour from commit to production-ready
- Rework Rate: If changes needed within 48h, review requirements clarity
